'''ngabuwu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nicker|nicker]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-b-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nicker|nicker]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ngabuwu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæbiwith|ngæbiwith]] || [[word:ngæbiwij|ngæbiwij]] || [[word:ngæbiwish|ngæbiwish]] || [[word:ngæbiwi|ngæbiwi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngabubuwuth|ngabubuwuth]] || [[word:ngabubuwuj|ngabubuwuj]] || [[word:ngabubuwush|ngabubuwush]] || [[word:ngabubuwu|ngabubuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngabuwuth|ngabuwuth]] || [[word:ngabuwuj|ngabuwuj]] || [[word:ngabuwush|ngabuwush]] || [[word:ngabuwu|ngabuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngabufwuth|ngabufwuth]] || [[word:ngabufwuj|ngabufwuj]] || [[word:ngabufwush|ngabufwush]] || [[word:ngabufwuf|ngabufwuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngabuwuthu|ngabuwuthu]] || [[word:ngabuwuju|ngabuwuju]] || [[word:ngabuwushu|ngabuwushu]] || [[word:ngabuwuku|ngabuwuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngabuwuth|ngabuwuth]] || [[word:ngabuwuj|ngabuwuj]] || [[word:ngabuwush|ngabuwush]] || [[word:ngabuwu|ngabuwu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngabuwuthul|ngabuwuthul]] || [[word:ngabuwujul|ngabuwujul]] || [[word:ngabuwushul|ngabuwushul]] || [[word:ngabuwukul|ngabuwukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngabuwuthuthu|ngabuwuthuthu]] || [[word:ngabuwujuju|ngabuwujuju]] || [[word:ngabuwushushu|ngabuwushushu]] || [[word:ngabuwuku|ngabuwuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngabuwuthun|ngabuwuthun]] || [[word:ngabuwujun|ngabuwujun]] || [[word:ngabuwushun|ngabuwushun]] || [[word:ngabuwukun|ngabuwukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngabuwuthuoro|ngabuwuthuoro]] || [[word:ngabuwujuoro|ngabuwujuoro]] || [[word:ngabuwushuoro|ngabuwushuoro]] || [[word:ngabuwukuoro|ngabuwukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
